creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 212534
ghostscript-agpl-9.52.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that updates print/ghostscript9-agpl-{base,x11} to 9.52.

This release also fixes a SIGFPE when "-dFirstPage" or -"dLastPage" is set (see also Ghostscript bug 702221).

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-, 12.1-RELEASE, 13.0-CURRENT@r358851 amd64 i386) -> OK
